metadata.title: About Health Calculators — Why They Matter | FitMetrics
metadata.description: Learn why BMI, BMR, IBW, Body Fat, and TDEE calculators are essential for your health. Understand what each metric means and how it helps you.

banner.title: Your Health,
banner.subtitle: Numbers alone do not tell the whole story. Understanding what each health metric means — and how it applies to your daily life — is the first step toward lasting well-being. Here is why these five calculators matter.

bottomCta.title: Ready to measure what matters?
bottomCta.subtitle: All five calculators are free — no sign-up required.
